data.title: Elizabeth Warren leads Senate Democrats in probe of AI data center debt deals
data.description:
Senator Elizabeth Warren and three Democratic colleagues are urging Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to investigate the financing arrangements being used by technology companies to fund artificial intelligence data centers. In a letter dated January 22, Warren, alongside Senators Richard Blumenthal, Chris Van Hollen, and Tina Smith, called on the Financial Stability Oversight Council to launch […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-probe-data-center-debt-deals/

data.title: XRP Completes ‘Super Guppy Compression’ Against Bitcoin, Next Target Emerges
data.description:
According to a recent technical analysis by market expert Egrag Crypto, XRP has formed a “Super Guppy Compression” against Bitcoin, signaling the potential for a major structural shift. The analyst has revealed what could come next for the XRP/BTC pair following this development, indicating a higher probability of a bullish breakout within the next few months. XRP Bitcoin Pair Forms Super Guppy Compression In his X post, Egrag Crypto provided a detailed breakdown of the XRP/BTC price structure and the recent patterns emerging within its chart. He suggested that the trading pair recently entered a transition phase after a multi-year decline, with price action tightening as the market moved through a period of compression
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-super-guppy-compression/

data.title: Nasdaq pushes SEC to unlock Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF options trading
data.description:
Stock exchange operator Nasdaq wants federal regulators to ease trading restrictions on options for Bitcoin and Ethereum exchange-traded funds. The company filed a request with the Securities and Exchange Commission on Jan. 21 asking officials to drop the current cap of 25,000 positions and exercise limits on options trading for several cryptocurrency funds. Exchange makes […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nasdaq-sec-lift-limits-on-etf-options/

data.title: South Korean prosecutors lose $48M of seized digital assets
data.description:
South Korean prosecutors lost approximately 70 billion won ($48 million) to a low-level phishing scam during a routine security check. Despite South Korea’s increased efforts to stop cryptocurrency scams, the country’s officials are investigating yet another theft and attempting to recover some of the stolen funds. South Korean prosecutors investigate loss of $48 million in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korean-prosecutors-lose-digital-assets/

data.title: Superstate Raises $82.5M to Scale Onchain Equity Issuance
data.description:

source: https://www.bankless.com/read/news/superstate-raises-82-5m-to-scale-onchain-equity-issuance

data.title: Binance Wallet Rolls Out AI Tools to Track On-Chain Hype and Narratives
data.description:
Binance Wallet has introduced three new AI-powered discovery features, Social Hype, Topic Rush, and AI Assistant, aimed at simplifying how users identify emerging on-chain trends and token narratives. The tools are now live within the wallet’s web interface and are designed to surface real-time signals across multiple blockchains, including BNB Smart Chain, Solana, and Base.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/binance-wallet-rolls-out-ai-tools-to-track-on-chain-hype-and-narratives/
